hero.title: World Cup predictions feel better when {rivalry} the rivalry is personal.
hero.subtitle: WorldPredict keeps the tournament focused on quick match picks, private groups, and live rankings that make every confirmed World Cup result matter.

aside.noUpcomingMatches: The backend has not published upcoming matches yet.
aside.signInPrompt: Sign in to save predictions, join private groups, and follow the ranking as results are confirmed.

title.makeEveryWorldCup: Make every World Cup fixture count.

subtitle.expandOneMatch: Expand one match at a time, save exact scores, and keep your tournament picks easy to scan.

errorMessages.invalidInput: Enter whole numbers between 0 and 20 for both scores.
errorMessages.matchClosed: This match is no longer open for predictions.
errorMessages.matchNotFound: We could not find that match. Refresh and try again.
errorMessages.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to save predictions.
errorMessages.updateFailed: We could not save your prediction right now. Try again.

profileIncomplete.title: Complete your profile to submit predictions.
profileIncomplete.body: Country and favorite team are required before we unlock the form.

groupSection.shareCode: Share this code with friends so they can join this group:

rankingSection.seeHowYourPoints: See how your points compare across all players, beyond your private groups.
rankingSection.yourPlaceInGlobalBoard: Your place in the global board
rankingSection.scoreFirstPrediction: Score your first matched prediction to appear in the ranking.
rankingSection.completeProfileAndScore: Complete your profile and score a match to join the ranking.
rankingSection.noGlobalRankingYet: No global ranking yet. Once scored predictions land, the board will appear here.

predictionSection.compactRowsShow: Compact rows show each fixture and pick status. Open a match to update the full prediction.

scoringExplanations.waitingForScoringDetail: Your prediction exists, but this match has not been scored yet.
scoringExplanations.finalScoreUnavailableDetail: We have the match marked as final, but the score is not available yet.
scoringExplanations.exactScoreDetail: You nailed the final score: {points} awarded.
scoringExplanations.correctOutcomeDetail: You predicted a {predictedOutcome}, and the match ended as {actualOutcome}.
scoringExplanations.wrongOutcomeDetail: You predicted a {predictedOutcome}, but the match ended as {actualOutcome}.

dashboardStrings.noUpcomingMatches: No upcoming World Cup matches open for prediction right now. New scored matches will appear above when results land.
dashboardStrings.noPredictionSubmitted: You did not submit a prediction for this match, so no points were awarded.

dashboardStrings.matchNoLongerOpen: This match is no longer open for predictions.

dashboardStrings.theseAreFinishedMatches: These are finished matches you predicted since you last cleared this section.

title.previewTheCard: Preview the card before you share it.

description.previewDescription: Preview your prediction, group standing, or performance summary with the current visual card treatment before you copy or share it.

errorMessages.invalidInput: Choose a valid prediction or group before generating a share card.
errorMessages.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to generate share cards.
errorMessages.predictionNotFound: We could not find that saved prediction.
errorMessages.performanceNotReady: Your performance summary is not ready yet.
errorMessages.groupForbidden: You need access to that group before sharing its standing.
errorMessages.groupNotReady: We could not find a ranking snapshot for that group yet.
errorMessages.createFailed: We could not generate the share card right now. Try again.

predictionForm.pickOneSaved: Pick one of your saved predictions and turn it into a clean share card.
predictionForm.usesYourSavedData: Uses your saved prediction data and the current visual card background.

performanceForm.showYourPoints: Show your points, exact picks, and current position in one card.

groupForm.chooseGroup: Choose one of your groups and turn the current table into a clean share card.
groupForm.showGroupInfo: Show your group name, current place, points, and predictions in one card.

templates.progressNotReady: Your tournament progress will show up here once your ranking is ready.
templates.groupLiveMessage: Your group is live with {points} points and {count} predictions on the board.
templates.pickGroupToPreview: Pick one of your groups to preview the current table before sharing it.

fallback.pickPredictionToEnable: Pick a saved prediction to enable copy/share.
fallback.generateCardToEnable: Generate the group card to enable copy/share.

subtitle.personalizeCompetition: We use country and favorite team to personalize your competition view.
